perf.regime: One Triton program per (token, head), streaming the top-k in BLOCK_N=64 chunks with online (flash) softmax and a [D] fp32 value accumulator; the attention sink folds in after the stream. Variant-agnostic (CSA/HCS/SWA selection is upstream of this compute). Perf unmeasured without a GPU.

notes: Portable Triton (runs on NVIDIA and AMD). BLOCK_N and num_warps are fixed internally (not exposed at the entry callable, hence not declared as knobs). This is the CUDA->HIP porting milestone target (§9): the same Op Spec reference validates both a future native CUDA card and a native HIP card via verify_parity. wave_size not load-bearing at this metadata tier.
